task_completion.description: Verify that 'The Events Calendar' plugin is installed and activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'The Events Calendar' in the WordPress Plugins list with a 'Deactivate' link, or check for the 'Events' menu item in the left-hand sidebar of the WordPress admin dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify that the venue 'Downtown Central Library' was created with the correct address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Downtown Central Library' in the 'Venues' list under the Events menu, or visible in the venue selection dropdown during event creation. The address '1200 Public Way, Metropolis, NY 10001' should be visible in the venue details.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and publication of the 'Summer Reading Kickoff' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Summer Reading Kickoff' in the published Events list or event editor. The date must be set to June 1, 2026, and the venue must be linked to 'Downtown Central Library'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and publication of the 'Digital Literacy Workshop' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Digital Literacy Workshop' in the published Events list or event editor. The date must be set to June 10, 2026, and the venue must be linked to 'Downtown Central Library'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and publication of the 'Local Author Meet & Greet' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Local Author Meet & Greet' in the published Events list or event editor. The date must be set to June 15, 2026, and the venue must be linked to 'Downtown Central Library'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the WordPress admin dashboard in a web browser to install the plugin and create the venue/events, rather than using terminal commands like WP-CLI or direct database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent accessed the provided schedule file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening or reading '~/Desktop/event_schedule.md' using a text editor, file manager, or terminal command (like 'cat') to obtain the event details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the event creation forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into the WordPress 'Add New Event' and 'Add New Venue' forms, selecting dates from the calendar widget, and clicking 'Publish'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected plugin is 'The Events Calendar'. The expected venue is 'Downtown Central Library' at 1200 Public Way, Metropolis, NY 10001. The three expected events from the schedule file are: 1) 'Summer Reading Kickoff' on June 1, 2026; 2) 'Digital Literacy Workshop' on June 10, 2026; 3) 'Local Author Meet & Greet' on June 15, 2026. All three events must be linked to the Downtown Central Library venue.
